name: vitoria-regia-pro
description: Sistema Vitória Régia Pro v12.9.2 com mobile estabilizado, cards responsivos e concierge Telegram com texto e áudio.

scripts.build: npm run install:client && npm run install:server && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build && rm -rf server/public && mkdir -p server/public && cp -a client/dist/. server/public/
scripts.install:all: npm install --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund --legacy-peer-deps && npm run install:client && npm run install:server
